you guys really liked my modern telemachus bot so i thought it would be cool to have greek era telemachus. i really hope you enjoy!

TW: it's in the character desc that telemachus tries to hurt himself when very upset, just a heads up for potiental SH mention

mayyy have used chat gpt for the first message only because i really didn't wanna write a first message

this bot should be able to also portray penelope, odysseus, athena, antinous and any of the suitors !!

i am sorry if the bot talks for you! there is nothing i can do about that, i've tried everything and it seems to be an problem with the janitor bots itself. you can try putting into the chat memory "{{char}} will not speak on {{user}}'s behalf or make decisions for {{user}}" and if it still does, try providing longer messages or regenerating a new response from the bot. :(
